jobs.title: Senior Devops Engineer
jobs.shortDescription: Experienced Senior DevOps Engineer to lead cloud infrastructure, CI/CD strategies, and deployment automation for AI/ML workloads in a fast-paced enterprise AI environment.
jobs.description: We seek an experienced Senior DevOps Engineer to lead cloud infrastructure, CI/CD strategies, and deployment automation for our AI/ML workloads. You'll architect scalable systems, mentor juniors, and drive operational excellence in a collaborative, fast-paced environment focused on enterprise AI innovation.
responsibilities: Design and optimize CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, or equivalent for complex AI model deployments
Architect and manage multi-cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP) with Kubernetes, Docker, and IaC tools like Terraform and Pulumi
Implement advanced monitoring, logging, and observability with Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, and chaos engineering practices
Lead security hardening, compliance audits (ISO 27001/42001), and zero-trust architectures for production AI systems
Automate workflows with Python/Bash/Go scripting and integrate with Jira, Confluence for agile DevOps practices
Mentor junior engineers, conduct code reviews, and drive on-call optimizations while scaling for high-availability AI services
Collaborate with R&D, data science, and sales teams to enable rapid AI prototyping to production
requirements: Bachelor's/Master's in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent with 3+ years in DevOps/SRE roles
Proven expertise in container orchestration (Kubernetes EKS/AKS/GKE), cloud-native services, and IaC
Strong experience with CI/CD, GitOps, and monitoring tools in production-scale environments
Proficiency in Linux, networking, security best practices, and scripting for automation
Familiarity with AI/ML ops (e.g., Kubeflow, MLflow, SageMaker) and agile tools like Jira
Excellent stakeholder communication skills; UK English proficiency preferred
preferred: Leadership in MLOps pipelines for enterprise AI deployments
Certifications: AWS/GCP Solutions Architect, CKA/CKAD, Terraform Associate
Experience with edge AI, serverless, or multi-region high-availability setups

jobs.title: Chief Product Officer (CPO)
jobs.shortDescription: Chief Product Officer to define and drive the product vision across AI solutions and platforms, leading product strategy and ensuring scalable, high-impact products.
jobs.description: We are hiring a Chief Product Officer to define and drive the product vision across our AI solutions and platforms. You will lead product strategy, identify new opportunities, and ensure we build scalable, high-impact products aligned with business goals.
responsibilities: Own the overall product strategy and roadmap
Identify new product opportunities in AI and enterprise tech
Work closely with clients, leadership, and engineering teams
Ensure product-market fit and scalable growth
Build and lead the product team
Drive innovation across AI use cases and solutions
requirements: 8+ years of product experience, with leadership roles
Strong understanding of AI, SaaS, and enterprise products
Proven track record of building and scaling products
Excellent strategic thinking and execution skills
Strong stakeholder and team leadership abilities

jobs.title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)
jobs.shortDescription: Hands-on CTO to lead the architecture, development, and scaling of AI-driven products and enterprise solutions with deep technical expertise.
jobs.description: We are looking for a hands-on CTO to lead the architecture, development, and scaling of AI-driven products and enterprise solutions. This role requires deep technical expertise, strong execution ability, and the capability to build systems that are scalable, reliable, and production-ready.
responsibilities: Define and drive the overall system architecture across AI platforms and SaaS products
Design scalable backend systems, microservices, and distributed architectures
Lead the development and deployment of AI/ML pipelines, LLM-based systems, and data workflows
Make decisions on tech stack, infrastructure, and engineering best practices
Oversee cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps processes
Ensure performance, security, and scalability across all systems
Work closely with product and business teams to translate requirements into technical solutions
Review code, mentor engineers, and enforce high engineering standards
Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies in AI and automation
requirements: 8+ years of experience in software engineering, with strong backend and system design expertise
Proven experience in building and scaling SaaS or AI-based products
Strong proficiency in system architecture, distributed systems, and API design
Experience with cloud platforms, containerization, and orchestration tools
Hands-on experience with AI/ML systems, LLM integrations, or data engineering pipelines
Strong understanding of databases (SQL/NoSQL), caching, and performance optimization
Experience in setting up CI/CD pipelines and DevOps workflows
Ability to write and review production-grade code
Strong leadership skills with experience building and managing engineering teams

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer (JS + Node)
jobs.shortDescription: Full-stack MERN developers to build responsive, high-performance web applications powering AI-driven products with React and Node.js.
jobs.description: We're seeking talented full-stack MERN developers to build responsive, high-performance web applications that power our AI-driven products. You'll deliver seamless user experiences by architecting scalable frontend interfaces with React and robust backend services using Node.js, MongoDB, and Express.js, while integrating AI/ML APIs for intelligent enterprise solutions.
responsibilities: Develop responsive, production-grade frontend interfaces using React 18+, Next.js, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS/TypeScript
Build scalable RESTful/GraphQL backend APIs with Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB (MERN stack) for AI data processing
Integrate third-party AI/ML APIs (e.g., TensorFlow.js, OpenAI) and ensure secure, real-time data flows with WebSockets/Socket.io
Optimize application performance, implement CI/CD pipelines, and ensure 99.9% uptime for mission-critical AI dashboards
Collaborate with UX designers, data scientists, and product teams using Jira/Confluence in agile sprints
Write clean, maintainable code following ISO 42001 AI standards, with comprehensive unit/integration testing (Jest, Cypress)
Deploy containerized apps to AWS/GCP with Docker and support MLOps workflows for model-driven UIs
requirements: 3+ years hands-on experience building production MERN stack applications (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js)
Expertise in modern JavaScript/TypeScript, React Hooks/Context API, and state management (Redux/Zustand)
Strong backend skills: Node.js microservices, JWT authentication, MongoDB aggregation pipelines, and Redis caching
Proven experience with REST/GraphQL APIs, performance optimization, and responsive design (mobile-first)
Familiarity with Git workflows, agile tools (Jira), and cloud deployment (Docker, Vercel, AWS Amplify)
Excellent problem-solving skills and UI/UX sensibility for enterprise AI applications
Strong communication skills; UK English proficiency preferred for global client documentation

jobs.title: Python Developer (FastAPI + OpenAI)
jobs.shortDescription: Python Developers to build scalable backend systems and AI-driven applications using FastAPI and OpenAI integrations.
jobs.description: We are hiring Python Developers to build scalable backend systems and AI-driven applications.
responsibilities: Develop backend systems and APIs using Python
Work on AI/ML integrations and data pipelines
Optimize performance and scalability of applications
Collaborate with product and frontend teams
Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code
requirements: 3+ years of experience in Python development
Experience with frameworks like FastAPI / Django / Flask
Understanding of APIs, databases, and system design
Exposure to AI/ML integrations is a plus
Strong debugging and problem-solving skills

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.shortDescription: Senior Product Managers to lead development of AI-powered platforms and enterprise-grade intelligent solutions, bridging business strategy with technical execution.
jobs.description: We're looking for Senior Product Managers to lead the development of AI-powered platforms and enterprise-grade intelligent solutions. You will work closely with clients, engineers, and leadership to translate complex business challenges into scalable AI products and data-driven systems. This role requires strong product thinking, an understanding of AI/LLM capabilities, and the ability to bridge business strategy with technical execution.
responsibilities: Own the end-to-end product lifecycle — from problem discovery and product definition to launch and continuous improvement
Work closely with enterprise clients and internal stakeholders to identify pain points and define AI-driven product opportunities
Create Product Requirement Documents (PRDs), user journeys, and feature roadmaps aligned with business goals
Collaborate with engineering, data and design teams to build scalable and reliable AI-powered solutions
Drive product decisions using data insights, user feedback, experimentation, and market research
Ensure high-quality and timely delivery of product milestones in a fast-moving environment
Contribute to shaping AI product strategy, platform capabilities, and long-term roadmap
requirements: 4+ years of product management experience, preferably in technology-driven organizations
Experience working on SaaS platforms, AI/ML products, or data-driven systems
Strong problem-solving ability and stakeholder management skills; ability to translate complex business needs into clear technical and product requirements
Familiarity with modern product and project management tools used for collaboration, documentation, and workflow tracking
Comfortable working in fast-paced startup environments with rapid iteration cycles
